Module com.example.cincuentazo
Package com.example.cincuentazo.model

Class Deck

java.lang.Object
com.example.cincuentazo.model.Deck
public class Deck extends Object
Represents the deck of cards used in a game of Cincuentazo.

The deck is backed by a Queue, which models the natural behaviour required by the game: cards are drawn from the front of the queue, while cards returned to the deck (for example, from an eliminated player) are placed at the back.

A standard 52-card deck is built on creation and shuffled. When the deck runs out of cards, it can be refilled from the table's discarded cards (handled by the game logic in a later phase).

  • Field Details

    • cards

      private final Queue<Card> cards
      Queue holding the cards of the deck (front = next to be drawn).

  • Constructor Details

    • Deck

      public Deck()
      Builds a full, shuffled 52-card deck.

  • Method Details

    • buildFullDeck

      private void buildFullDeck()
      Populates the deck with all 52 combinations of suit and rank.

    • shuffle

      public void shuffle()
      Randomly shuffles the cards currently in the deck.

      Because Collections.shuffle(java.util.List<?>) works on lists, the cards are temporarily copied to a list, shuffled, and then placed back into the queue. This list is a transient utility and not part of the deck's persistent structure.

    • draw

      public Card draw()
      Draws and removes the card at the front of the deck.
      Returns:
      the card drawn from the top of the deck
      Throws:
      NoSuchElementException - if the deck is empty

    • addToBottom

      public void addToBottom(Card card)
      Adds a card to the back of the deck. Used when an eliminated player's cards are returned to the deck.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to add; must not be null
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the card is null

    • size

      public int size()
      Returns the number of cards currently in the deck.
      Returns:
      the deck size

    • isEmpty

      public boolean isEmpty()
      Checks whether the deck has no cards left.
      Returns:
      true if the deck is empty
